svg.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.aria-label: Architecture: TikTok data export flows through a Python download engine and a self-hosted Cobalt resolver into a local SQLite-indexed archive, served by FastAPI to a React web app and Plex.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: A local pipeline that turns a TikTok data export into a browsable, Plex-ready archive.
